mapper.select:
SELECT u.id, u.auth_no, u.username, u.real_name, u.email, u.phone, u.dept_id, u.status, u.create_time, u.create_by, u.update_time, u.update_by, u.deleted FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND (u.auth_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
